info.english_meaning: to love to satisfy to wish to desire to show kindness
info.hindI_arTa: prItI karanA tfpta karanA kAmanA karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kAntiH = kAmanA  ' prIN prItO prIyateprInAt prIRIte tarpaRe YitaH  aRO yO YittvasAPalyAt prIRayet prayate prayet ' (Slo. 19-20) iti devaH
